title: Spring Boot Basics
body: Learned about @RestController, @Service, @Repository, dependency injection, and how Spring Boot automatically wires beans together.

title: Spring Data JPA
body: JpaRepository provides CRUD methods out of the box. Hibernate generates SQL automatically based on entity mappings.

title: JWT Authentication
body: JWT contains a header, payload, and signature. The server verifies the signature to ensure the token has not been tampered with.

title: Project Roadmap
body: Finish CRUD API first. Then add exception handling, validation, users, JWT authentication, authorization, testing, and deployment.

title: DSA Practice
body: Complete today's Striver problems. Focus on understanding patterns instead of memorizing solutions.

title: Database Design
body: Every note will eventually belong to one user. The relationship between User and Note will be implemented after CRUD is complete.
